description: Perform a geometric construction study of a four-bar linkage mechanism in LibreCAD. Draw a Crank-Rocker mechanism consisting of a Ground link (200mm, from 0,0 to 200,0), a Crank link (60mm, starting at 0,0 at a 60-degree angle), a Coupler link (250mm), and a Rocker link (150mm). The drawing must include an angular dimension for the Rocker link relative to the ground. Organize the drawing using layers: 'MECHANISM' (Blue) for links, 'CONSTRUCTION' (Gray, Dot linetype) for construction geometry, and 'DIMENSIONS' (Red) for the dimension. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/linkage_study.dxf.
